name: Estate-wide budget-resume admin-merge sweep
description: When the GitHub Actions budget exhausts and the BLOCKED-but-MERGEABLE PR queue exceeds the threshold (default 50), trigger the .git-private-farm/dispatch-templates/budget-resume-sweep.yml workflow which admin-merges PRs matching AM001-AM009 title shapes (Hypatia.Rules.AdminMergeEligibility).

discovery.root_cause: Estate fan-out workflows (mirror/secret-scanner/codeql/scorecard/hypatia-scan/language-CI) across 354 repos burn through monthly GH Actions minutes faster than the sweeps that file their wrapper-replacement PRs. Required-CI checks never complete → auto-merge never fires → backlog accumulates.
